Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, ALT, and chloride, with low globulin, suggesting possible renal and mild hepatic dysfunction. Urinalysis reveals proteinuria, glucosuria, ketonuria, bilirubinuria, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance, indicating significant renal impairment and possible tubular dysfunction. Further nephrological and hepatological evaluation is recommended.
